constraints[region_id]['storage_compromised'].append('Fertilizer_DAP')\n        if 'maize seeds (hybrid) storage integrity compromised' in content:\n            constraints[region_id]['storage_compromised'].append('Maize_Seeds_Hybrid')\n        if 'maize seeds (local) storage integrity compromised' in content:\n            constraints[region_id]['storage_compromised'].append('Maize_Seeds_Local')\n        \n        # Road blocked\n        if 'checkpoint established' in content:\n            constraints[region_id]['road_blocked'] = True\n        \n        # Processing bottleneck\n        if 'processing station at capacity' in content:\n            constraints[region_id]['processing_bottleneck'] = True\n        \n        # Weather blocked\n        if 'heavy rains expected to block transit' in content:\n            constraints[region_id]['weather_blocked'] = True\n\n# Calculate metrics for each region\nregion_metrics = []\nfor rid, r in regions.items():\n    inv = r['inventory']\n    total_inv = sum(inv.values())\n    yield_gap = r['yield_stats']['target'] - r['yield_stats']['historical_avg']\n    \n    # Calculate available inventory that can be redistributed\n    # Items with compromised storage should be redistributed out\n    available_for_export = 0\n    for item, amount in inv.items():\n        if item in constraints[rid]['storage_compromised']:\n            available_for_export += amount  # Must move out\n    \n    # Need is proportional to yield gap\n    need_score = yield_gap\n    \n    # Available capacity for receiving\n    capacity_remaining = r['capacity_tons'] - total_inv\n    \n    # Classify region\n    is_source = available_for_export > 0\n    is_dest = capacity_remaining > 50  # At least some space\n    is_constrained = (constraints[rid]['road_blocked'] or \n                      constraints[rid]['weather_blocked'])\n    \n    region_metrics.append({\n        'id': rid,\n        'name': r['name'],\n        'yield_gap': yield_gap,\n        'total_inventory': total_inv,\n        'capacity_remaining': capacity_remaining,\n        'compromised_items': constraints[rid]['storage_compromised'],\n        'available_for_export': available_for_export,\n        'need_score': need_score,\n        'is_source': is_source,\n        'is_destination': is_dest and not is_constrained,  # Can't receive if fully blocked\n        'is_constrained': is_constrained,\n        'constraints': constraints[rid]\n    })\n\n# Sort by need (yield gap) for prioritization\nregion_metrics.sort(key=lambda x: x['need_score'], reverse=True)\n\n# Identify sources and destinations\nsources = [r for r in region_metrics if r['is_source'] and not r['is_constrained']]\ndestinations = [r for r in region_metrics if r['is_destination']]\nblocked = [r for r in region_metrics if r['is_constrained']]\n\nprint(f\"Sources (have compromised inventory to move): {len(sources)}\")\nprint(f\"Destinations (can receive): sources:\n    rid = src['id']\n    inv = regions[rid]['inventory']\n    \n    # Each compromised item type needs to be moved\n    for item in src['compromised_items']:\n        amount = inv.get(item + '_tons', 0)\n        if amount == 0:\n            continue\n        \n        # Find destinations prioritizing highest need gaps\n        remaining = amount\n        for dst in destinations:\n            if remaining <= 0:\n                break\n            if dst['capacity_remaining'] <= 0:\n                continue\n            \n            # Calculate how much this destination can receive\n            can_receive = min(remaining, dst['capacity_remaining'])\n            \n            # Cost calculation\n            cost = can_receive * TRANSPORT_COST_PER_TON\n            if total_cost + cost > BUDGET:\n                can_receive = min(can_receive, (BUDGET - total_cost) / TRANSPORT_COST_PER_TON)\n                can_receive = int(can_receive)\n            \n            if can_receive <= 0:\n                break\n            \n            # Record shipment\n            shipment = {\n                'from_region': src['id'],\n                'to_region': dst['id'],\n                'resource_type': item,\n                'quantity_tons': can_receive,\n                'transport_cost_usd': can_receive * TRANSPORT_COST_PER_TON\n            }\n            shipment_schedule.append(shipment)\n            \n            # Update totals\n            total_cost += shipment['transport_cost_usd']\n            total_tons_moved += can_receive\n            remaining -= can_receive\n            dst['capacity_remaining'] -= can_receive\n            \n            # Update target inventory for destination\n            if dst['id'] not in target_inventory:\n           'Maize_Seeds_Local_tons': regions[src['id']]['inventory']['Maize_Seeds_Local_tons']\n                }\n            target_inventory[src['id']][item + '_tons'] -= can_receive\n\n# Calculate region_metrics if r['compromised_items']]),\n    'road_blocked_count': len([r for r in region_metrics if r['constraints']['road_blocked']]),\n    'processing_bottleneck_count': len([r for r in region_metrics if r['constraints']['processing_bottleneck']]),\n    'weather_blocked_count': len([r for r in region_metrics if r['constraints']['weather_blocked']]),\n    'constrained_regions': 'budget_remaining_usd': remaining_budget,\n        'total_tons_redistributed': total_tons_moved,\n        'source_regions': len(sources),\n        'destination_regions': len([d for d in destinations if d['id'] in target_inventory]),\n        'shipments': shipment_schedule\n    },\n    'target_inventory_by_region': target_inventory,\n    'critical_constraints_identified': critical_constraints,\n
